appliedUpdates.description: Recorded hardening-specific concurrency limits plus flow-validator guidance for first-run/notification integration coverage, live bridge parity runs on iOS and Android, and release artifact validation.

notes: Serialized all hardening validators because the host already had Android Studio, an active Android emulator, iOS simulator processes, IDEs, and multiple droid workers sharing the same Flutter workspace and mission service ports.

Cross-area hardening assertions were validated through targeted Flutter integration harnesses on the Android emulator, while platform parity reran reconnect/offline, foreground notification routing/dedup, and live bridge approval UI flows on both the configured iOS simulator and Android emulator.

The shared bridge at http://127.0.0.1:3110 and verified Tailscale Serve mapping were reused throughout validation; no Android adb repair was required during the parity pass, and build validation produced the APK, bridge binary, and macOS app bundle artifacts successfully.

Notification validation for this milestone remained foreground-only per mission guidance, so pass/fail decisions were limited to active-app notification context, stale suppression, and dedup behavior rather than true background or terminated-app delivery.
